scanner_registry.description: Primary registry for all X-ray scanners and their paired accelerators at the terminal.

asset_tag.description: Internal ERP asset tag (links to asset_master)

accelerator_serial.description: Null if scanner has no accelerator (e.g. X-ray only)

location.description: Physical gate, lane or dock location

nra_source_registration_no.description: NRA source registration number for the accelerator/radiation source

computed_fields.current_certification: JOIN to compliance_certificates WHERE scanner_id = this.id AND is_current = TRUE

certification_registry.description: All NRA certificates and inspection records for scanners/accelerators.

application_deadline.description: Auto-calculated: certificate_expiry_date MINUS 4 months. Generated by DB trigger or application logic.

is_current.description: True for the active certificate per scanner

document_path.description: S3/local path to uploaded certificate PDF

constraints: Only one row with is_current=TRUE per scanner_id at any time (enforced via partial unique index or trigger)

triggers.before_insert_update: Set application_deadline = certificate_expiry_date - INTERVAL '4 months' whenever certificate_expiry_date is set
triggers.after_insert: When is_current = TRUE, set is_current = FALSE on all other rows for same scanner_id

survey_meter_registry.description: Registry of all radiation survey meters used at the terminal for compliance monitoring.

assigned_to_scanner_id.description: Null if pool meter not assigned to specific scanner

computed_fields.calibration_status: IF calibration_expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'expired' ELSE IF calibration_expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE + 30 THEN 'due_soon' ELSE 'current'

calibration_history.description: Historical log of all survey meter calibrations.

inspection_certification_cycle.description: Manages the full lifecycle of NRA inspection and certification for each scanner.

states.active_certified: Scanner has a current, valid certificate.
states.application_due: Certificate expiry is within 4 months — application must be submitted.
states.application_submitted: Renewal application has been filed with NRA.
states.awaiting_inspection: NRA inspection is scheduled or pending.
states.expired: Certificate has expired. Scanner operations are flagged for review.
states.decommissioned: Scanner permanently removed from service — no further certifications required.

transitions.action: Upload document, set certificate_issue_date, certificate_expiry_date; recalculate application_deadline; set is_current = TRUE
Update certification_status to 'issued'; schedule next reminder cycle
Set certification_status = expired; flag scanner; notify manager
Allow late renewal; log audit event

deadline_calculation.implementation: PostgreSQL trigger on INSERT/UPDATE of compliance_certificates where certificate_expiry_date IS NOT NULL
deadline_calculation.override: Compliance manager can manually set a different application_deadline with audit log entry

reminder_schedule.escalation: If application not submitted by deadline, escalate to compliance_manager role

record_locking.rule: When certification_status = 'expired', scanner operational_status is automatically flagged to 'inactive'

annual_nra_reporting_workflow.description: Compiles, versions, and exports the annual regulatory report submitted to the NRA.

states.draft: Report is being compiled — data can be edited.
states.in_review: Report submitted internally for management review.
states.approved: Report approved by compliance manager — locked for editing.
states.submitted: Report physically or electronically submitted to NRA.

data_sources.maintenance_activities: SELECT * FROM compliance_maintenance WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM maintenance_date) = report_year
data_sources.major_breakdowns: SELECT * FROM compliance_breakdowns WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM breakdown_date) = report_year
data_sources.corrective_actions: SELECT * FROM compliance_corrective_actions WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM action_date) = report_year
data_sources.repairs: SELECT * FROM compliance_repairs WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM repair_date) = report_year
data_sources.inspections: SELECT * FROM compliance_certificates WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM last_inspection_date) = report_year
data_sources.certifications: SELECT * FROM compliance_certificates WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM certificate_issue_date) = report_year
data_sources.survey_meter_calibrations: SELECT * FROM compliance_calibration_records WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM calibration_date) = report_year

report_data.description: Frozen snapshot of all report data at time of approval

annual_nra_reporting_workflow.audit_trail: All changes to report data logged to compliance_audit_log with before/after values

maintenance_records.description: Scheduled and unscheduled maintenance activities on scanners/accelerators.

work_order_id.description: Link to ERP work order if applicable

downtime_hours.description: Auto-calculated from downtime_start/end, or manually entered

breakdown_records.description: Unplanned equipment failures and the corrective actions taken.

nra_notification_required.description: Some breakdowns may require NRA notification

corrective_action_records.description: Structured corrective actions arising from breakdowns or inspection findings.

preventive_measure.description: What was done to prevent recurrence

repair_records.description: Detailed records of all repair activities, internal or vendor-performed.

configuration.description: Configurable reminder rules — one row per event type and interval.

days_before.description: Number of days before the deadline to fire this reminder

default_intervals.note: This is also the application_deadline trigger

reminder_log.description: Record of every reminder sent — prevents duplicate sends and provides audit trail.

erp_notifications.description: In-app notification bell items for the ERP dashboard.

link.description: Deep link to the relevant record in the ERP

cron_jobs.description: Scheduled background tasks that drive the reminder engine.

jobs.name: compliance_expiry_checker
jobs.description: Runs daily at 07:00. Checks all certificates and survey meters for upcoming deadlines. Fires reminders per config. Updates certification_status where CURRENT_DATE > certificate_expiry_date.

jobs.name: compliance_breakdown_escalator
jobs.description: Runs daily at 08:00. Identifies breakdowns open > 72 hours and escalates to manager.

jobs.name: compliance_annual_report_reminder
jobs.description: Runs on the 1st of each month. In Q4, sends annual report preparation reminders.

compliance_dashboard.description: Single-call KPI summary for the compliance landing page.

response_schema.certificates_expiring_30d: integer — count of certs expiring in next 30 days
response_schema.application_overdue: integer — past deadline, application not submitted
response_schema.upcoming_expirations: array — [{scanner_serial, location, expiry_date, days_remaining, status}] sorted ASC

compliance_rate.description: % of time each scanner was in a certified state vs expired during the year.

annual_nra_report.description: Auto-compiles all compliance data for the specified year into a structured report.

asset_master.description: Scanner and survey meter records link to the asset master for depreciation, lifecycle tracking, and procurement history.
asset_master.sync_direction: compliance → asset_master (compliance is source of truth for operational status)

work_orders.description: Maintenance activities can be initiated from or linked to ERP work orders. Work order closure triggers maintenance record update.

procurement.description: Repair and parts procurement is linked to the ERP procurement module for cost tracking and vendor management.

document_management.access_control: Files served via authenticated API route — direct filesystem URLs are not exposed

user_management.usage: All created_by, updated_by, logged_by, assigned_to fields reference users.id. Role-based access via compliance.* permissions.
user_management.default_assignee: User with compliance_officer role at scanner's location

notification_service.erp_internal: compliance_notifications table → frontend polling or WebSocket push
notification_service.email: Reuses existing emailService (nodemailer) from the ERP
notification_service.sms: Optional — configurable via system_config (twilio_sid, twilio_token, twilio_from)
notification_service.cron: Node-cron or pg_cron running inside the backend service

spare_parts.description: Parts replaced in repairs and corrective actions can reference the spare parts inventory, automatically triggering stock deductions.

atomic_permissions.description: View all compliance records, scanners, certificates, survey meters
Create and update scanner registry, certification records, notes
Mark application as submitted; enter application reference and date
Upload certificate documents and set certification status to 'issued'
Delete draft or cancelled compliance records
Update breakdown records, root cause, corrective actions
Mark breakdowns as closed or resolved
Update repair records and cost data
View all compliance reports and the annual report
Mark the annual report as submitted to NRA
Configure reminder intervals, escalation rules, NRA settings

audit_logging.description: All CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE operations on compliance tables are logged via the existing audit_logs table. The entity field uses values like 'compliance_scanner', 'compliance_certificate', 'compliance_maintenance', etc.
audit_logging.fields_tracked: All field changes stored as {before, after} JSONB in details column
audit_logging.document_uploads: Certificate and report uploads generate a dedicated audit event: action='compliance:document_uploaded'

triggers_to_create: trg_compliance_cert_application_deadline — BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON compliance_certificates: SET application_deadline = certificate_expiry_date - INTERVAL '4 months'

trg_compliance_cert_set_current — AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON compliance_certificates WHERE is_current = TRUE: UPDATE compliance_certificates SET is_current = FALSE WHERE scanner_id = NEW.scanner_id AND id != NEW.id

trg_compliance_scanner_status_on_expiry — called by cron job: UPDATE compliance_scanners SET operational_status = 'inactive' WHERE id IN (SELECT scanner_id FROM compliance_certificates WHERE is_current = TRUE AND certificate_expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE AND certification_status != 'expired')
